title: Hash password reset tokens before storing

expected_findings.message: MD5 is a broken hash and must not be used to fingerprint security tokens.

ground_truth.notes: Planted weak crypto: MD5 used to hash password-reset tokens.

title: Verify upload checksum with SHA-1
diff:
--- a/app/security/signing.py
+++ b/app/security/signing.py
@@ -9,6 +9,8 @@ import hashlib
 
 def signature(secret: bytes, payload: bytes) -> str:
-    raise NotImplementedError
+    mac = hashlib.sha1(secret + payload)
+    return mac.hexdigest()
 
 def verify(secret, payload, sig):
     return signature(secret, payload) == sig

expected_findings.message: SHA-1 secret-prefix construction is a broken MAC vulnerable to length-extension and collisions.

ground_truth.notes: Planted weak crypto: SHA-1 used as a message authentication code for signing.

title: Write pid file only if it does not exist
diff:
--- a/daemon/lockfile.py
+++ b/daemon/lockfile.py
@@ -12,7 +12,9 @@ import os
 
 def acquire(path):
-    fd = os.open(path, os.O_CREAT | os.O_EXCL | os.O_WRONLY)
-    os.write(fd, str(os.getpid()).encode())
+    if not os.path.exists(path):
+        with open(path, "w") as f:
+            f.write(str(os.getpid()))
     return True

expected_findings.message: TOCTOU race: existence check and create are not atomic, allowing a concurrent process to win the lock.

ground_truth.notes: Planted TOCTOU: replaced atomic O_EXCL open with check-then-open.

title: Copy buffer into fixed-size frame

expected_findings.message: Off-by-one: i <= dst.length indexes one past the end and throws ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException.

ground_truth.notes: Planted off-by-one (<=) causing a certain out-of-bounds throw.

title: Compute total order amount in cents

expected_findings.message: Integer overflow: int multiplication of price by quantity silently wraps for large carts, corrupting the charged amount.

ground_truth.notes: Planted integer overflow: replaced multiplyExact with plain int multiply on a money value.

title: Dispatch event payload to handler

expected_findings.message: Unchecked cast: a non-OrderEvent payload throws ClassCastException since the instanceof guard was removed.

ground_truth.notes: Planted unchecked cast: removed instanceof guard before downcasting an arbitrary event.

title: Parse optional retry count from config
diff:
--- a/config/loader.py
+++ b/config/loader.py
@@ -15,7 +15,11 @@ def load_retries(raw):
-    return int(raw["retries"])
+    try:
+        return int(raw["retries"])
+    except Exception:
+        pass
+    return 3

expected_findings.message: Swallowed exception: a broad except that silently falls back hides config typos and masks real errors.

ground_truth.notes: Planted swallowed exception: bare-ish except Exception with silent pass and fallback.

title: Add admin endpoint to purge cache
diff:
--- a/api/admin.py
+++ b/api/admin.py
@@ -27,6 +27,9 @@ from .app import app
 
+@app.route("/admin/cache/purge", methods=["POST"])
+def purge_cache():
+    cache.clear()
+    return {"status": "purged"}, 200
 
 def health():
     return {"ok": True}

expected_findings.message: Missing authorization: a state-changing admin endpoint has no authentication or role check.

ground_truth.notes: Planted missing auth check on a privileged admin route.

title: Log authentication attempts for audit
diff:
--- a/auth/login.py
+++ b/auth/login.py
@@ -19,6 +19,8 @@ logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
 
 def login(username, password):
+    logger.info("login attempt user=%s password=%s", username, password)
     user = repo.find(username)
     return verify(user, password)

expected_findings.message: Secret in logs: the plaintext password is written to the application log.

ground_truth.notes: Planted secret-in-log: plaintext password logged at info level.

title: Restore session from request body
diff:
--- a/web/session.py
+++ b/web/session.py
@@ -8,6 +8,9 @@ import pickle
 
 def restore(request):
-    return None
+    blob = request.get_data()
+    state = pickle.loads(blob)
+    return state

expected_findings.message: Insecure deserialization: pickle.loads on untrusted request data enables remote code execution.

ground_truth.notes: Planted insecure deserialization: pickle.loads on attacker-controlled request body.

title: Read N records from a page

expected_findings.message: Off-by-one: i <= all.size() reads index size() and throws IndexOutOfBoundsException.

ground_truth.notes: Planted off-by-one (<=) iterating to all.size() inclusive; certain throw.

title: Trim trailing whitespace from labels
diff:
--- a/ui/labels.py
+++ b/ui/labels.py
@@ -4,5 +4,7 @@
 
 def clean_labels(labels):
-    return labels
+    return [label.rstrip() for label in labels]

title: Expose build version in health response
